untranslatable_reason: Signal requires custom correlation coefficient calculation between primary and companion series, pair-specific divergence thresholds based on 75th percentile of historical divergence magnitude, and correlation adjustment factors. These are not available in the allowed indicator list. The signal also references a multi-asset pair analysis framework that cannot be expressed using single-instrument indicators only.
translation_notes: The signal describes a sophisticated regime-dependent divergence normalization framework requiring cross-series correlation analysis and dynamic threshold calibration. This exceeds the scope of single-instrument technical indicator rules. Provided proxy uses moving average crossovers as a general mean-reversion context, but does not capture the core divergence-based logic or pair-specific calibration described in the source material.
